race.comment: NAVYONTHEHIGHWAY (5) caught the eye first up when she made good late ground to get up for third over 1000m at Eagle Farm. Talented mare with a strong second-up record. Got through the soft ground well last time and over an extra 200m today looks hard to hold out. SOOTHSAYER (11) raced handy and tried hard but couldn't pick up subsequent winner Cosmo Centaurus when resuming over this trip at Eagle Farm three weeks ago. Has won two from three when second-up, the failure coming at Group 3 level. No wins for around three-and-a-half years is the niggle. BUNDELLA (6) made it four wins in a row, all at 1200m, when comfortably home in a BM78 a fortnight ago at Eagle Farm. Harder this time but difficult to knock. OUROBOROS (9) led but tired late when resuming over 1110m at Doomben last time. Better placed out to this trip and is sure to give plenty of cheek. McDonald's mount SUNSHINEINMYPOCKET (8) has won two from three when fresh so he is a chance despite a wide barrier.
